title: tigridia bracteolata
intro: Tigridia bracteolata, also known as the Mexican shellflower or tiger flower, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tigridia bracteolata include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and aiding in the management of fever. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in topical applications such as salves and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
